title: Publish the 1-user MVP release scope and next-task order
acceptance_criteria: docs/relayhq-build-plan.md states the 1-user MVP release slice in plain language.
The plan explicitly says RelayHQ is control-plane only and vault-first.
The plan includes a clear next-task order for the MVP release path.
The plan states that Kioku is only included as a real boundary, not a placeholder.
completion_summary: Published the 1-user MVP release slice, next-task order, and Kioku boundary in the build plan
